title: Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
body:
I am getting this fail with verilator version v4.224-82-gcbe1b8e26 on Linux (Linux GatorCountry 5.13.0-52-generic #59~20.04.1-Ubuntu SMP Thu Jun 16 21:21:28 UTC 2022 x86_64 x86_64 x86_64 GNU/Linux).  

Background: I have not seen the SEGV with previous versions of verilator;  I tried several versions back to 4.106 this past week since I have been debugging bad sim results with verilator (and iverilog passing), related to incorrect clocking behavior.  After splitting [clk, rst] into separate signals, I ran ~15000 core cycles successfully today (v4.224-26-g8b7480806).

* repo = https://github.com/OpenPOWERFoundation/a2o

```
cd dev/sim/verilator
verilator -cc  --exe --trace --Mdir obj_dir --language 1364-2001 -Wno-fatal -Wno-LITENDIAN --error-limit 1  -Iverilog/a2o_litex -Iverilog/work -Iverilog/trilib -Iverilog/unisims a2owb.v tb_litex.cpp  |& tee verilator.txt

...

- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_044_life.tree
- V3Table.cpp:431:    tableAll: 
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=6.4 ALWAYS 0x55575b3a3080 <e88880570> {by572ah}
- V3Simulate.h:367:   Unknown node type in SimulateVisitor: WHILE
- V3Simulate.h:367:   Unknown node type in SimulateVisitor: WHILE
- V3Simulate.h:367:   Unknown node type in SimulateVisitor: WHILE
- V3Simulate.h:367:   Unknown node type in SimulateVisitor: WHILE
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=5.93623 ALWAYS 0x555708b0a4d0 <e86114748> {lf389ac}
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=1.6254 ALWAYS 0x555708de2e70 <e86123761> {lf389ac}
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=1.6254 ALWAYS 0x555708f57810 <e86127594> {lf389ac}
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=3.10303 ALWAYS 0x5557090c4d10 <e86131111> {lf389ac}
- V3Table.cpp:239:     Table Optimize spacetime=5.93623 ALWAYS 0x555709f4c6e0 <e86177528> {lf389ac}
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_045_table.tree
- V3Const.cpp:3704:   constifyAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_046_const.tree
- V3Dead.cpp:468:     deadifyDTypesScoped: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_047_deadDtypesScoped.tree
- V3Active.cpp:609:   activeAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_048_active.tree
- V3Split.cpp:1013:   splitAlwaysAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_049_split.tree
- V3SplitAs.cpp:197:  splitAsAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_050_splitas.tree
- V3TraceDecl.cpp:530:traceDeclAll: 
- V3Ast.cpp:1154:     Dumping obj_dir/Va2owb_051_tracedecl.tree
- V3Force.cpp:305:    forceAll: 
- V3Gate.cpp:1528:    gateAll: 
dot -Tpdf -o ~/a.pdf obj_dir/Va2owb_052_gate_simp.dot

Program received signal SIGSEGV, Segmentation fault.
```
